templates.name: Cookie Banner Dismisser
templates.description: Automatically dismisses cookie consent banners on page load using 40+ selectors, text-based button matching, shadow DOM traversal, and a MutationObserver fallback for late-appearing banners.

scripts.name: Cookie Banner Dismisser
scripts.description: Dismisses cookie consent banners using selector matching, text matching, shadow DOM traversal, and a MutationObserver fallback for late-appearing banners
